Trails.Name: Lost in the Woods (Lower) Uphill Route
Lost in the Woods (Upper) Uphill Route

_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
Monday, March 2, 2026 7:00 AM – We received 1-2 inches of new snow overnight. A lingering cloud over the upper mountain is creating low visibility conditions this morning. Partly cloudy skies are expected today, with moderate winds easing through the day. 19 lifts are scheduled to spin at 8:30AM, conditions permitting. See below for more information. Snow will be hard and fast this morning, especially in shaded, upper-mountain areas. Please use caution and ski within your ability. Some terrain may be proactively closed in the morning and opened later as conditions allow. 
 
Conditions and Visibility: Partly cloudy skies with temps in the 30s today. Moderate SW winds will grow calmer and shift to the NE this afternoon.  
Lift status: 19 lifts are scheduled to spin today at 8:30AM, conditions permitting. Cloud Nine Express (9), Chair 14, Chair 23, and the Upper Panorama Gondola will start today on a visibility hold, but are expected to open as conditions allow. Chair 25 will be closed today for maintenance. 
Events: Happy Hour from 3-5PM at Woolly’s Adventure Summit.  
Full Moon Snowshoe Tour presented by Smartwool from 6:30-8:15PM at Tamarack Cross-Country Ski Center. 
Safety: Find terrain that suits your ability. Accidents often happen when skiers and riders move into terrain beyond their comfort level. Take a moment to plan your route using a trail map or the Ikon App. Visit our Safety page for more tips. Our on-mountain emergency hotline is: 760.934.0611 
Road Conditions: Always be prepared for winter mountain driving and watch for icy patches in shaded areas. Check our Road Conditions page for the latest status.
_inspectorSnowReport.SafetyReport:
Put the bar down.
On-mountain emergency hotline: 760.934.0611
